description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions release workflow that runs daily and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have four jobs: build-linux-x64, build-linux-arm, build-windows, and build-darwin. Each job should checkout the repository, perform architecture-specific builds, and upload artifacts. The update-nightly-release job should wait for all build jobs to complete, download artifacts, create a release zip, generate release notes, and update the nightly GitHub release.
